items.title: If You Bought 1 Share of Home Depot at Its IPO, Here's How Many Shares You Would Own Now
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: If you had bought one share of Home Depot during its IPO in 1981, you would now own 341 shares due to 13 stock splits, worth $133,672 at the current share price.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Home Depot is described as a best-performing stock and a go-to retailer for home improvement, indicating its strong performance and growth over the long term.
